testcase.name: runScenario
testcase.failure: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "com.booking.page.ReservePage.isAt()" because "this.container.reservePage" is null at test.ReserveApartment.user_landed_in_reserve_page_user_selects_appartment_under_and_clicks_reserve(ReserveApartment.java:18) at ✽.User landed in reserve page user selects 1 appartment under "Three-Bedroom Apartment" and clicks reserve(classpath:features/SearchBusByLocationWithDate.feature:8)
